name: Mcilwain School Bus Line
districts_or_customers: Over 90 schools across Somerset and Cambria Counties, PA; ~10,000 students transported daily
recent_news: Received 50-year award from PA School Bus Association (date unspecified); actively hiring as of 2025; no public M&A signals found.
fit_notes: Strong tuck-in candidate: 3rd-generation western PA family operator with 300-bus fleet, 90+ school relationships, and diversified school/SPED/charter mix. Sons are involved (Patrick, Timothy, Toby), but founder-generation Douglas (now ~3rd gen patriarch) provides potential succession window. Anchors Summit's PA expansion thesis; D&B/revenue data in source ($3.4M) is materially understated vs. company-stated scale.

name: Wittenberger Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Hartford School District (Hartford, WI) — special education and extracurricular busing
recent_news: Wittenberger Bus Service of Hartford, WI reported in 2022 to be in talks with GO Riteway about route handoff/sale amid driver shortages (Washington County Insider). Florida address (The Villages) appears to be a personal/retirement residence of Gene Wittenberger, NOT an operating depot.
fit_notes: Likely a data-mapping artifact: company operates from Hartford, WI (not FL); The Villages address is principal's residence. Active operating company is sub-scale (~11 employees, ~$1M revenue) and already exploring exit (GO Riteway talks). Out-of-footprint for Summit's FL expansion; only relevant if Summit is open to WI tuck-ins or if FL-domiciled entity holds a separable contract — neither indicated.

name: Grady's Bus Ctr
recent_news: No corroborating evidence found that an operating school-bus contractor exists at this name or address.
fit_notes: Likely a data-quality issue. 2603 Durham Rd, Bristol PA is 'Bristol Plaza' — a retail shopping center (former Pathmark, Hair Cuttery, Namco Pool & Patio, Options Insurance). No public web presence for 'Grady's Bus Center' as a school-bus operator; assigned website 'Opinions.Net' is a generic catch-all. Recommend dropping from pipeline unless better source can locate Pearlean Grady as a real operator (possible micro/family contractor flying under the radar, but no evidence).

name: Mao & Ed Bus Svc Inc
recent_news: No corroborating evidence found. No web presence, no FL DOE contractor listing, no news.
fit_notes: Likely a data-quality artifact. 10657 Pelican Dr, Wellington FL 33414 is within 'Wellington's Edge,' a residential subdivision of single-family homes — not a commercial bus depot. Assigned website 'Applyforjobsonline.Net' is a generic catch-all and toll-free 855 phone is unverified. No FL Palm Beach County school-bus contractor lists this name. Recommend deprioritizing pending better sourcing.

name: Butlers Bus Svc
owner_or_parent: Total Transportation Corp (part of First Student / EQT Infrastructure)
principals: Operated under Total Transportation Corp management
districts_or_customers: Mount Vernon City School District (First Student/All County are listed contractors)
recent_news: 80 Edison Ave, Mount Vernon NY 10550 is confirmed as a Total Transportation Corp school-bus depot (phone 718-647-5100). Total Transportation is part of the First Student family of brands. First Student was acquired by EQT Infrastructure in 2021; ongoing tuck-in activity continues across NY metro.
fit_notes: Not actionable as a tuck-in: address is a Total Transportation Corp depot (First Student / EQT Infrastructure-owned strategic), not an independent 'Butler's Bus Service.' The Butler's Bus Service at butlersbus.com is a separate NH/VT-based operator unrelated to this Mount Vernon address. Data record appears to conflate a legacy/defunct local listing with a current strategic-owned depot. Drop from independent tuck-in target list.
